productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Printed Steeple Grey Tshirt
description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves, distresed graphic print and applique work on the front, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo.
